sausage-roll.name: Signature SELECT Country Style Pork Sausage Roll, 16 oz

eggs.name: Eggs
eggs.notes: 42 eggs total: 12 for Breakfast Burritos, 6 for French Toast, 24 for Big Breakfast.

burrito-tortillas.name: Great Value Burrito Flour Tortillas, 20 oz, 8 Count
burrito-tortillas.notes: Burrito size only — separate from taco tortillas.

white-onion.name: White Onion
white-onion.notes: ½ onion for Breakfast Burritos, ½ for Tacos, ½ for Burgers. Buy 2 total.

fiesta-blend-cheese.name: Great Value Fiesta Blend Shredded Cheese, 32 oz
fiesta-blend-cheese.notes: ~2 cups for Breakfast Burritos, ~2 cups for Tacos. One bag covers both meals.

hashbrowns.name: Signature SELECT Shredded Country Hash Browns, 30 oz

white-bread.name: Great Value White Round Top Bread Loaf, 20 oz
white-bread.notes: 1 loaf for French Toast, 1 for Big Breakfast, 1 for Grilled Cheese, 2 for Sandwiches.

fruit-mixed.name: Fruit (mixed)
fruit-mixed.quantity: 5 lbs total (2 lb strawberries + 2.25 lb grapes + extras)
fruit-mixed.notes: 3 lbs for Pancakes & Waffles, 2 lbs for Croissant Sandwiches.

maple-syrup.name: Great Value Original Syrup, 24 fl oz

croissants.name: Marketside All Butter Whole Baked Croissants

black-forest-ham.name: Great Value Black Forest Ham, Sliced, 32 oz
black-forest-ham.notes: Shared between Croissant Sandwiches and Hiking Sandwiches.

cheddar-sliced.name: Great Value Sharp Cheddar Deli Style Sliced Cheese, 8 oz, 12 Slices
cheddar-sliced.notes: Shared between Croissant Sandwiches and Hiking Sandwiches.

ground-beef-roll.name: Signature SELECT Ground Beef 80/20 Chub
ground-beef-roll.notes: ~1.5 lbs for Tacos, ~2 lbs for Burgers, ~1 lb for Spaghetti. 4.5 lbs used, 0.5 lb spare.

chicken-bag-1.name: Signature Select Frozen Chicken Breasts Value Pack, 3.5 lb
chicken-bag-1.notes: Split between Tacos (~1.5 lbs) and Spaghetti Alfredo (~1.5 lbs). Separate bag from Chicken Parm.

chicken-bag-2.name: Signature Select Frozen Chicken Breasts Value Pack, 3.5 lb
chicken-bag-2.notes: Used entirely for Chicken Parm. Separate bag from Tacos/Alfredo bag.

taco-seasoning.name: Great Value Taco Seasoning Mix, Original, 1 oz
taco-seasoning.notes: 2 packets for beef, 1 packet for chicken.

taco-shells.name: Taco Shells (hard)
taco-shells.notes: On hold — 1 person prefers hard shells, group polling in progress.

taco-tortillas.name: Great Value Medium Soft Taco Flour Tortillas, 17.5 oz, 10 Count
taco-tortillas.notes: Taco size only — separate from burrito tortillas.

sour-cream.name: Daisy Pure and Natural Sour Cream, 24 oz

shredded-lettuce.name: Marketside Fresh Shredded Iceberg Lettuce, 16 oz

slicing-tomatoes.name: Fresh Slicing Tomato
slicing-tomatoes.notes: 1 pack for Tacos, 1 pack for Burgers.

russet-potatoes.name: Fresh Whole Russet Potatoes, 5 lb Bag

butter-box.name: Butter
butter-box.notes: ~2 sticks for Steaks, ~2 sticks for Grilled Cheese, 2-3 tbsp for Spaghetti. One box covers all three.

whole-milk.name: Great Value Whole Vitamin D Milk, 1 gallon
whole-milk.notes: ~1 cup for mashed potatoes. Remainder available for other uses.

burger-buns.name: Nature's Own Perfectly Crafted Brioche Style Hamburger Buns, 8 Count

dill-pickles.name: Vlasic Sandwich Dill Pickle Chips, 24 fl oz

yellow-mustard.name: Great Value Yellow Mustard, 20 oz Squeeze Bottle
yellow-mustard.notes: Shared between Burgers and Hiking Sandwiches.

pepper-jack-cheese.name: Great Value Pepper Jack Deli Style Sliced Cheese, 8 oz, 12 Slices

kraft-singles.name: Kraft Singles American Slices, 24 Count
kraft-singles.notes: ~7 slices for Burgers, ~14 slices for Grilled Cheese. One pack covers both.

tomato-soup.name: Campbell's Condensed Tomato Soup, 10.75 oz Can (4 Pack)

marinara-sauce.name: Great Value Marinara Pasta Sauce, 23 oz
marinara-sauce.notes: 1 jar for Chicken Parm, 1 jar for Spaghetti.

parmesan-shaker.name: Great Value Grated Parmesan Cheese, 8 oz Shaker
parmesan-shaker.notes: ~4 oz for Chicken Parm, ~4 oz for Spaghetti. One shaker covers both.

spaghetti-pasta.name: Great Value Spaghetti Pasta, 1 lb, 4 Count

alfredo-sauce.name: Great Value Classic Alfredo Pasta Sauce, 22 oz

garlic-bread.name: Signature SELECT Garlic Toast, 8-count, 11.25 oz
garlic-bread.notes: 1 box for Chicken Parm, 1 box for Spaghetti.

chicken-nuggets.name: Foster Farms Chicken Breast Nuggets, 33.6 oz

frozen-pizzas.name: Signature SELECT Rising Crust Pepperoni Pizza, 30.5 oz

pizza-rolls.name: Totino's Pepperoni Pizza Rolls, 63.5 oz, 130 Count

corndogs.name: State Fair Classic Corn Dogs, 58.7 oz, 22 Count
corndogs.notes: Out of stock online — check in-store.

turkey-breast.name: Great Value Fat-Free Turkey Breast, 16 oz Bag, Sliced
turkey-breast.notes: Rollback price. Shared between Croissant Sandwiches and Hiking Sandwiches.

hersheys-chocolate.name: Hershey's Milk Chocolate XL Bars, 4.4 oz

graham-crackers.name: Honey Maid Graham Crackers, Party Size, 28.8 oz
graham-crackers.quantity: 1x party size box ($6.94) — equivalent to 2 regular boxes

bacon.name: Great Value Hickory Smoked Bacon, Mega Pack, 24 oz

english-muffins.name: Great Value Original Fork Split English Muffins, 12 oz, 6 Count

cinnamon-rolls.name: Pillsbury Cinnamon Rolls with Icing, 8-count, 12.4 oz
cinnamon-rolls.notes: Bonus/afterthought — just a little extra on the table.

ingredients.use: Crumbled into the egg scramble filling
ingredients.prep: Brown in a skillet over medium-high heat, breaking into crumbles. Drain grease before mixing with eggs.

ingredients.use: Scrambled into the burrito filling
ingredients.prep: Crack into a bowl, whisk, season with salt & pepper. Cook in the same pan as sausage over medium-low heat.

ingredients.use: Burrito wraps — large flour tortillas
ingredients.prep: Warm on a dry skillet for 30 seconds per side or microwave wrapped in a damp paper towel for 30s.

ingredients.use: Sautéed into the burrito filling for flavor
ingredients.prep: Dice finely. Sauté in oil over medium heat until translucent, ~5 min, before adding sausage.

ingredients.use: Sautéed into the egg filling for color and crunch
ingredients.prep: Slice into thin strips or dice. Sauté with onion over medium heat until softened, ~5–7 min.

ingredients.use: Sautéed into the egg filling alongside the mixed peppers
ingredients.prep: Slice into thin strips or dice. Sauté with onion over medium heat until softened, ~5–7 min.

ingredients.use: Sprinkled over the hot filling inside the burrito before rolling
ingredients.prep: Sprinkle generously over filling. The residual heat will melt it.

ingredients.use: Served as a side dish alongside the burritos
ingredients.prep: Cook from frozen on a greased skillet over medium-high heat, ~4–5 min per side until golden and crispy. Season with salt.

ingredients.use: Sliced and dipped in egg custard, then pan-fried
ingredients.prep: Use thick-cut slices (~¾ inch). Soak each slice in custard for 20–30 sec per side.

ingredients.use: Combined with milk to make the custard dip
ingredients.prep: Whisk eggs with a splash of milk, vanilla, cinnamon, and a pinch of salt. Pour into a shallow dish for dipping.

ingredients.use: Scrambled or fried to order for the whole group
ingredients.prep: For scrambled: whisk with a splash of milk, cook over medium-low heat stirring slowly. For fried: crack directly into a buttered pan over low heat.

ingredients.use: Served alongside eggs and toast
ingredients.prep: Lay flat in a cold pan, heat to medium. Cook ~4 min per side until crispy. Drain on paper towels. Or bake at 400°F for 18–20 min on a sheet pan.

ingredients.use: Toasted and served alongside eggs and bacon
ingredients.prep: Fork split and toast until golden. Serve with butter.

ingredients.use: Toasted to serve alongside the eggs and meat
ingredients.prep: Toast in a toaster or on a griddle with butter until golden. Serve with butter and jam if available.

ingredients.use: Baked and set out as a sweet bonus alongside everything else
ingredients.prep: Preheat oven to 350°F (or as labeled). Place rolls in a greased pan. Bake 12–15 min until golden. Drizzle included icing while warm.

ingredients.use: Batter base for the pancakes
ingredients.prep: Follow box instructions — typically 1 cup mix + ¾ cup water. Don't over-mix; lumps are fine. Cook on a greased griddle over medium heat until bubbles form (~2 min), then flip.

ingredients.use: Toaster waffles served alongside pancakes for variety — ~3-4 people on the waffle side
ingredients.prep: Toast from frozen in a toaster or toaster oven until golden and crispy, ~2 cycles. Serve immediately with syrup and fruit.

ingredients.use: Fresh fruit served as the side with pancakes and waffles
ingredients.prep: Wash and slice as needed. No cooking required. Serve cold.

ingredients.use: Topping for pancakes and waffles
ingredients.prep: Serve at room temp or warm briefly in a small saucepan. Set bottles on the table.

ingredients.use: The bread base for the sandwiches — slice and fill
ingredients.prep: Slice horizontally. Optional: warm in oven at 300°F for 3–5 min for a crispy exterior. Layer with ham, cheese, and mustard/mayo.

ingredients.use: The main protein filling for the croissant sandwiches
ingredients.prep: Serve cold from the pack or warm briefly in a skillet over medium heat until edges curl slightly.

ingredients.use: Turkey option for the croissant sandwiches
ingredients.prep: Layer 2-3 slices per sandwich. Keep refrigerated until assembling.

ingredients.use: Cheese layer in the croissant sandwich
ingredients.prep: Serve cold or let sit at room temp for 10 min for better flavor. Lay 1–2 slices on each sandwich.

ingredients.use: Fresh fruit side dish alongside the sandwiches
ingredients.prep: Wash and slice as needed. Serve cold.

ingredients.use: One of two taco proteins — seasoned ground beef filling
ingredients.prep: Brown in a skillet over medium-high heat, drain fat. Add 2 packets taco seasoning with ½ cup water, simmer 5 min until thickened.

ingredients.use: One of two taco proteins — seared and sliced chicken filling
ingredients.prep: Thaw overnight. Season with salt and pepper. Pan-sear in oil over medium-high heat, ~5-6 min per side until 165°F internal. Rest 5 min, then slice thin. Add 1 packet taco seasoning + ¼ cup water, toss to coat and simmer 2-3 min.

ingredients.amount: 3 packets total (2 for beef, 1 for chicken)
ingredients.use: Seasoning for both taco proteins — beef and chicken
ingredients.prep: Beef: after draining fat, add 2 packets + ½ cup water, simmer 5 min. Chicken: after searing, add 1 packet + ¼ cup water, toss to coat, simmer 2-3 min.

ingredients.use: Hard shell option for tacos
ingredients.prep: Warm in oven at 350°F for 3–5 min on a baking sheet. Stand upright in a baking dish to keep them from tipping.

ingredients.use: Soft taco shells
ingredients.prep: Warm on a dry skillet 30 sec per side or microwave in a stack wrapped in a damp paper towel for 30s.

ingredients.use: Sprinkled over assembled tacos as a topping
ingredients.prep: Sprinkle directly onto tacos. No prep needed.

ingredients.use: Cooling topping dolloped on finished tacos
ingredients.prep: Serve chilled straight from the container. Set out with a spoon for self-serve.

ingredients.use: Sauce/condiment — mild, medium, and hot options for the table
ingredients.prep: Serve at room temp. Set all bottles out so everyone can pick their heat level.

ingredients.use: Topping layer in tacos for crunch
ingredients.prep: No prep needed — bag comes pre-shredded. Keep refrigerated until serving.

ingredients.use: Diced fresh tomato topping for tacos
ingredients.prep: Dice into small cubes. Salt lightly and let sit 5 min to draw out juice, then drain before serving.

ingredients.use: Raw diced onion topping for tacos
ingredients.prep: Dice finely. Serve raw as a topping. Optional: soak diced onion in cold water for 10 min to mellow sharpness.

ingredients.use: Boiled and mashed into the side dish
ingredients.prep: Peel and cube into 1-inch pieces. Boil in salted water ~15–20 min until fork-tender. Drain, mash with butter and warm milk. Season with salt and pepper.

ingredients.use: Mixed into mashed potatoes + used to baste and finish steaks
ingredients.prep: 1 stick into hot mash while still warm. Use remaining butter to baste steaks in the pan during the last 1–2 min of cooking.

ingredients.use: Warmed and stirred into mashed potatoes for creaminess
ingredients.prep: Warm in a small saucepan or microwave (don't boil). Add gradually while mashing to reach your desired consistency.

ingredients.use: Formed into patties — the main protein
ingredients.prep: Form into 7 patties (~4 oz / quarter pound each). Season both sides with salt and pepper. Grill or pan-cook over high heat, ~3–4 min per side for medium. Don't press down with a spatula.

ingredients.use: Bun for each burger — toast for best results
ingredients.prep: Toast cut-side down on the grill or skillet with a little butter for ~1 min until golden.

ingredients.use: Classic burger topping — flat chips designed for sandwiches and burgers
ingredients.prep: Drain jar before serving. Set out with tongs or a fork for self-serve.

ingredients.use: Sliced tomato topping for burgers
ingredients.prep: Slice into 1/4-inch rounds. Lay flat on a plate for self-serve.

ingredients.use: Whole leaf topping for burgers
ingredients.prep: Slice into rounds — 1 round per burger. Keep refrigerated until serving.

ingredients.use: Classic condiment for the burger bar
ingredients.prep: Set out on the table at room temperature.

ingredients.use: Classic condiment for the burger bar
ingredients.prep: Set out on the table at room temperature.

ingredients.use: Sliced raw for the burger bar
ingredients.prep: Slice into thin rounds. Serve raw. For caramelized onions: cook in butter over low heat for 25-30 min stirring occasionally.

ingredients.use: Spicy cheese option for burgers — melted on the patty
ingredients.prep: Lay a slice on the patty 1 min before it comes off the heat. Cover pan/grill briefly to melt.

ingredients.use: Meltiest cheese option for burgers
ingredients.prep: Add to patty in the last minute of cooking. American melts the best — great for a classic smash-style burger.

ingredients.use: Baked fries served alongside the burgers
ingredients.prep: Preheat oven to 425°F. Spread fries in a single layer on a baking sheet. Bake 20-25 min, flipping halfway. Season with salt immediately out of the oven.

ingredients.use: The bread for grilled cheese — 2 slices per sandwich
ingredients.prep: Use standard sandwich slices. Butter one side of each slice generously before placing butter-side-down in the pan.

ingredients.use: Main cheese filling — layer 2 slices per sandwich
ingredients.prep: Stack 2 slices in the center of bread. Cook on medium-low heat — low and slow ensures the cheese fully melts before the bread burns (~3-4 min per side).

ingredients.use: Spread on the outside of each bread slice for the golden crust
ingredients.prep: Soften to room temp for easy spreading. Coat the outer faces evenly. Cook in a pan over medium-low heat until deep golden.

ingredients.use: Served as the dipping side alongside the sandwiches
ingredients.prep: Empty cans into a large pot. Add equal part milk (or water) and stir. Heat over medium, stirring frequently, until steaming. Do not boil.

ingredients.use: The main protein — breaded, baked, then topped with marinara and parm
ingredients.prep: Thaw overnight. Pound to ~½ inch even thickness. Dredge in flour, then egg wash, then breadcrumb/parm mixture. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 min until 165°F internal and breading is golden. Add marinara and parm in the last 5 min.

ingredients.use: The pasta base served under or alongside the chicken
ingredients.prep: Boil in well-salted water for ~10-12 min until al dente. Drain, toss with a ladleful of marinara to coat.

ingredients.use: Poured over the baked chicken and mixed with penne
ingredients.prep: Warm in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally. Spoon over chicken in the last 5 min of baking and toss with pasta.

ingredients.use: Sprinkled over the chicken and pasta to finish — also goes in the breading
ingredients.prep: Mix a few tablespoons into the breadcrumb coating. Sprinkle generously over the finished dish. Set the container on the table for extra.

ingredients.use: The side dish served alongside
ingredients.prep: Bake from frozen at 375°F for 8-10 min (wrapped in foil), then open foil for last 2-3 min to crisp up. Watch it — it burns fast.

ingredients.use: The pasta base for all three sauce options — make a big pot for the whole group
ingredients.prep: Boil in heavily salted water for ~9-11 min until al dente. Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining — helps loosen sauce. Toss with chosen sauce immediately.

ingredients.use: Red sauce option — toss with spaghetti and top with ground beef
ingredients.prep: Warm in a pot over medium heat. Add reserved pasta water a splash at a time if too thick. Toss with drained pasta.

ingredients.use: Alfredo sauce option — toss with spaghetti and top with sliced chicken
ingredients.prep: Warm in a small saucepan over medium-low heat, stirring frequently. Add a splash of pasta water to loosen if needed. Do not boil.

ingredients.use: Browned and mixed into the marinara for the meat sauce track
ingredients.prep: Brown in a skillet over medium-high heat, breaking into crumbles. Drain fat. Add directly to simmering marinara and cook together for 5-10 min.

ingredients.use: Cooked and sliced on top for the chicken alfredo track
ingredients.prep: Thaw overnight in fridge. Season with salt, pepper, and garlic powder. Pan-sear in oil over medium-high heat, ~5-6 min per side until 165°F internal. Rest 5 min then slice thin.

ingredients.use: Tossed with spaghetti and parmesan for the buttered noodles track
ingredients.prep: Toss hot drained pasta with 2-3 tbsp butter and a splash of pasta water. Add parmesan and toss until creamy. Season with salt and black pepper.

ingredients.use: The side dish served alongside the pasta
ingredients.prep: Bake from frozen at 375°F for 8-10 min (wrapped in foil), then open foil for last 2-3 min to crisp up. Watch it — it burns fast.

ingredients.use: Finishing cheese sprinkled over the pasta at the table
ingredients.prep: Set the container on the table for self-serve. No prep needed.

ingredients.use: Fresh salad served alongside the pasta
ingredients.prep: Toss greens with desired toppings and dressing. Serve cold.

ingredients.use: Late night snack — cook a batch whenever people get hungry
ingredients.prep: Bake at 400°F for 12-15 min on a baking sheet, flipping once. Or air fry at 400°F for 8-10 min. Serve with ketchup, ranch, or buffalo sauce.

ingredients.use: Personal-sized pizzas for late night — one per person, one spare
ingredients.prep: Bake directly on the oven rack at 400°F for 14-17 min until crust is crispy and cheese is bubbly. Let cool 2 min before cutting.

ingredients.use: Shareable late night snack — cook a batch at a time
ingredients.prep: Bake at 425°F for 13-15 min until golden. Let sit 2 min before eating — filling is extremely hot. Or microwave on a plate for 1:15, flip, then 1:15 more.

ingredients.use: Late night crowd-pleaser — heat and serve
ingredients.prep: Bake at 375°F for 16-18 min, turning once. Or microwave individually for 60-90 sec. Serve with mustard and ketchup.

ingredients.use: The slider buns — soft and slightly sweet, perfect for pulled chicken
ingredients.prep: Slice the whole slab of rolls horizontally without separating. Layer filling, then replace top. Optionally brush with butter and bake at 350°F for 5-8 min to warm through.

ingredients.use: Tossed with half the pulled chicken for the buffalo batch
ingredients.prep: Mix into warm chicken in a pan or bowl. Use as much or as little as you want — taste as you go for heat level.

ingredients.use: Tossed with the other half of chicken for the BBQ batch
ingredients.prep: Mix into warm chicken in a pan. Simmer over medium heat for 2-3 min until sauce thickens slightly and coats the chicken.

ingredients.use: Melted over the assembled sliders before serving
ingredients.prep: Lay slices over filled sliders. If baking to warm: the cheese melts during the 5-8 min in the oven. Otherwise microwave assembled sliders for 30 sec.

ingredients.use: The base for hiking sandwiches — make ahead the morning of
ingredients.prep: Lay out all slices assembly-line style. Spread condiments first, then layer meat and cheese. Wrap individual sandwiches in foil or plastic wrap and refrigerate until packing.

ingredients.use: Ham filling for hiking sandwiches
ingredients.prep: Layer 2-3 slices per sandwich. Keep refrigerated until assembling.

ingredients.use: Turkey filling for hiking sandwiches
ingredients.prep: Layer 2-3 slices per sandwich. Keep refrigerated until assembling.

ingredients.use: Cheese layer in hiking sandwiches
ingredients.prep: Lay 1–2 slices on each sandwich.

ingredients.use: Spread on sandwiches before assembly
ingredients.prep: Spread on one inner face of bread before layering meat and cheese.

ingredients.use: Spread on sandwiches before assembly
ingredients.prep: Spread on the other inner face of bread. Mustard on one side, mayo on the other is classic.

ingredients.use: Toasted over the campfire — the star of the s'more
ingredients.prep: Skewer on a roasting stick. Hold over embers (not flames) rotating slowly for even browning. Pull away when golden and puffed. For the brave: light it on fire briefly then blow out.

ingredients.use: The chocolate layer — 1-2 squares per s'more
ingredients.prep: Break bars into individual squares ahead of time. The heat from a freshly toasted marshmallow will melt the chocolate slightly when sandwiched.

ingredients.use: The outer shell — 2 crackers sandwich the chocolate and marshmallow
ingredients.prep: Break along the scored lines into rectangles. Pre-stack each s'more kit: 1 cracker + 1-2 chocolate squares on the bottom, top cracker ready to sandwich.
